mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, November 5-6, 1863
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Head Quarters, Army of the Potomac, Col. Murray's farm, discussing his cold, the weather, military news such as the destruction of a railroad, and well wishes for family.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2070
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
